## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Say `...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node version: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- Copilot CLI version: [run `ghcp --version`]
- LLM Council version: [check package.json or `git log --oneline -1`]

## Additional context

Any other context (logs, config overrides, etc.)
